title: StretchLab | Don't just stretch - get stretched
meta_description: StretchLab offers customized assisted stretch sessions with certified stretch practitioners who are trained in kinesiology and other types of therapy.
body_markdown:

Why Stretch?  Benefits  First Timers 
##  The StretchLab Difference 
Don't just stretch - get stretched. StretchLab's team of highly trained Flexologists® will give you a deeper stretch than you could ever achieve on your own. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/stretches?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
##  Reclaim Your Freedom 
Imagine standing taller, running faster, bending easier – now make that a reality. Assisted stretching will improve your range of motion & flexibility, reduce pain and tension. So you can move - better. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/benefits?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
##  Get Ready To Live Long 
Never been to StretchLab? You’re in for a treat. Our studios are open, fun & energetic! Your stretch will be customized to fit your body's needs and help you meet your flexibility goals. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/first-timers?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/homepage-stretchlab-difference-880x1232.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/homepage-stretchlab-difference-880x1232.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/homepage-stretchlab-difference-880x1232.jpg)
##  EXPERT-LED INDIVIDUALIZED SERVICES 
![young man in 20s and older man in 50s receiving stretch therapy from trained experts at an assisted stretching studio, lying flat on backs and receiving hamstring and quad stretch for tension relief](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/homepage-expert-led-services-1040x585.jpg?width=1040&height=585&name=homepage-expert-led-services-1040x585.jpg)
One-on-one Stretches
StretchLab is known for our 25 and 50 minute one-on-one stretch sessions with expert Flexologists, customized to fit your individual needs to focus on problem areas and target certain muscle groups. 
Select studios may offer group sessions. 
![StretchLab stretch practitioner guiding woman through Normatec compression therapy](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/StretchLab%20Normatec.jpg?width=1100&height=734&name=StretchLab%20Normatec.jpg)
Normatec(™) Compression Therapy 
Normatec™ is a pneumatic compression therapy designed to help improve circulation, flexibility and muscle recovery. The Normatec™ leg attachments utilize compressed air to massage the leg muscles and mobilize fluid.
Members get one complimentary session, plus the option to add-on more Normatec™ sessions to your existing membership. Inquire with your studio to learn more!
[ MORE ON OUR SERVICES ](https://www.stretchlab.com/stretches)
![Mockup StretchLab App](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Mockup%20StretchLab%20App.png?width=1197&height=1400&name=Mockup%20StretchLab%20App.png)
**Download Our App**
Create an account to book your stretches and earn points!
[![badge_apple-store-download_black](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/badge_apple-store-download_black.png?width=148&height=50&name=badge_apple-store-download_black.png)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stretchlab-live-long/id1484392665?amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7) [![Google Play](https://www.stretchlab.com/hs-fs/hubfs/Classpoints/Google%20Play.png?width=168&height=50&name=Google%20Play.png)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.xponential.stretchlab&amp_device_id=5b5oOkBTTkImhZ9qMo9JM7)
##  THE STRETCHLAB STANDARD 
We stand for making you stand taller - be it literally, through improved posture and balance, or mentally, with the newfound confidence to go about your day with renewed energy and freedom that comes from a properly stretched body.
As the worldwide leader in assisted stretching services, our mission is to provide the highest quality assisted stretching services to clients of all types - connecting your **flexibility** and**range of motion** to an**increase in quality of life, energy, and lifestyle,** through ensuring every guest experiences our values of **freedom, energy, growth, community, and caring** in every single visit.
##  WHAT OUR MEMBERS ARE SAYING 
![female volleyball player jumping up to hit a ball across the net](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-RosemaryS.jpg)
"The staff is amazing and knowledgeable." 
Love love love this place. I was willing to start coming to prevent injuries after playing several years of volleyball. I've increased my flexibility, range of motion and have prevented any further injuries. the staff is amazing, extremely knowledgeable, professional and always willing to assist to meet my goals. Highly recommend StretchLab!! 
– Rosemary S. 
![male runner stretching his legs in front of a waterway with a sunset](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonials-405x570-AndrewP.jpg)
"It's equally as important as any gym membership I have. So good." 
Highly recommend. I'm an athlete and naturally tight. My first session was borderline "spiritual". I'll be back many times. Already signed up for the membership and for me, it's equally important and as valuable as any gym membership I have. SO GOOD!! 
– Andrew P. 
![Older woman stretching on a yoga mat](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-BethC.jpg)
"I Feel HUman Again." 
I’ve gone to StretchLab once a week for the past 5 weeks. I have multiple issues with my back and neck. I am so thankful to have the help that StretchLab has given me to help me feel human again. I will continue to go because I can’t wait to see what other opportunities I can gain by going. 
- Beth C. 
![Man working out pulling on rope](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonials-405x570-DanielG.jpg)
"The stretches were things I could not have done on my own." 
I do CrossFit and yoga regularly, but I have trouble with chronically tight hamstrings and hip flexors. Sarah did a fantastic job of stretching me out. She listened carefully and adjusted the depth of the stretching accordingly. The stretches were things that I could not have done on my own. They were performed safely and the facility itself was extremely clean. Cannot say enough positive things about the experience! 
– Daniel G. 
![Trio of female dancers](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-CaitlinC.jpg)
"I love StretchLab as a competitive dancer." 
I love coming to StretchLab every week! My flexibility has improved incredibly since coming here. As a competitive dancer, I have noticed better results in my dancing as well! All of the staff members are very supportive and professional. I cannot wait for my visit next week! 
– Caitlin C. 
![Woman being assisted in stretching by flexologist](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonials-405x570-AlyssaG.jpg)
"The missing piece of the fitness puzzle." 
The missing piece of the fitness puzzle! This place is amazing. Adding in stretching will help break any plateaus in the gym and help eliminate aches and pains we deal with from sitting at desks or overtraining muscles. Stretching has helped me move better and feel my best. If you're looking for friendly, professional staff and to feel a difference in your body, this is your place! 
– Alyssa G. 
![Older man demonstrating shoulder and arm stretches](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonials-405x570-SpencerW.jpg)
"It's amazing what good, concentrated stretching will do for you." 
This has been life changing for me, I honestly feel 10x better every time I come out of there. It's amazing what good, concentrated stretching will do for you. Ask for Paris, she is awesome. 
– Spencer W. 
![female tennis player on dirt court](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-DebV.jpg)
"Being able to feel great after my tennis matches is amazing." 
I am so exited to have found StretchLab. I'm an older tennis player with knee issues. The results I've had not only on the tennis court but being able to feel great after my matches and walk without pain is amazing! The Flexologists ask about your specific issues and customize a one-on-one stretch session just for you. I’ve increased the number of matches I can play a week as well. StretchLab is a game changer for me! 
– Deb V. 
![LewisH demonstrating a proper golf swing](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-LewisH.jpg)
"Helps my golf game!" 
I was very skeptical of trying this. But, the experience and results were great. Helps my golf game! 
– Lewis H. 
![GaylenK pushing a sled of weights across a grass floor in a gym](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-GaylenK.jpg)
"My chronic hip pain has disappeared." 
I have suffered from multiple injuries to my back, hip, knees. I often felt tight, and even pain pretty regularly. I work out consistently, but sadly, stretching was something I never committed to. Until now. StretchLab has made such a difference. My chronic hip pain and tightness has disappeared thanks to Jesse Ruiz and our consistent stretching practice. I highly recommend adding a regular stretch to your fitness regime. 
– Gaylen K. 
![female volleyball player jumping up to hit a ball across the net](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Homepage/Testimonials/Testimonial-405x570-RosemaryS.jpg)
